title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.212 - Failure of board members to attend meetings, commission's power to replace
text:
67.212.  Failure of board members to attend meetings, commission's power to replace. — The county commission of any county may replace any member on any board over which the commission has the authority to appoint members for failing without good cause to attend meetings of the board.
(L. 1998 S.B. 676)
